And when he worked, he talked about his [[Snap|great plan]]. Even disassembled, I wanted to please him.|Nebula to the [[Avengers]]|Avengers: Endgame}} '''Nebula''' is a former [[Luphomoid]] assassin, an adopted daughter of [[Thanos]] and adopted sister of [[Gamora]]. Together with Gamora, Nebula was assigned to [[Ronan the Accuser]], during his [[Quest for the Orb|quest]] to retrieve the [[Orb]], although Gamora eventually betrayed them. Due to her hatred of Thanos, Nebula joined Ronan when he betrayed Thanos and tried to use the [[Power Stone]] by himself to destroy [[Xandar]]. During the [[Battle of Xandar]], Nebula fought against the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] but was forced to retreat from the battle. Later, Nebula was captured by the [[Sovereign]] and handed back to the Guardians, although she was able to escape and help the [[Ravagers|Ravager]] [[Taserface]] in a mutiny against [[Yondu Udonta]]. Nebula then attempted to kill Gamora, but they reconciled, so she helped the Guardians in their fight against [[Ego]]. Nebula pursued her revenge mission against Thanos and was even able to infiltrate the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'', but her attempt to kill him failed. Thanos captured and tortured Nebula, using her as a bargaining tool to force Gamora to reveal the location of the [[Soul Stone]]. Nebula managed to escape and regrouped with the Guardians and the [[Avengers]] on [[Titan]]. During their battle against Thanos, Nebula realized that he had killed Gamora to get the Stone, which provoked [[Quill]] into attacking Thanos while he was under the control of [[Mantis]]. Thanos regained control and eventually won the battle and obtained the [[Time Stone]]. When he later obtained all of the [[Infinity Stones]] he used their power to [[Snap|obliterate half]] of the universe's population. Nebula survived the Snap, along with [[Tony Stark]]. The pair wandered in space onboard the ''[[Benatar]]'' for 22 days, before being rescued by [[Captain Marvel]]. When [[Thanos]] was eventually slain by [[Thor]], Nebula and [[Rocket]] officially joined the Avengers to maintain order in the galaxy. Five years later, Nebula participated in the [[Time Heist]], as the Avengers attempted to obtain the [[Infinity Stones]] from alternate timelines, to [[Blip|resurrect]] the victims of the Snap. [[Time Travel|Time-traveling]] into an [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate 2014]] with [[War Machine]], Nebula retrieved the [[Power Stone]]. Before she could return to her original timeline she was captured by the alternate [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]], who then learned about her timeline and sought to bring his army there. Nebula was able to convince the alternate [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] to turn against Thanos. She was among the participants of the [[Battle of Earth]], during which she killed her [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate self]] to save the lives of the alternate Gamora and [[Hawkeye]]. She fought with the assembled Avengers and helped defeat Thanos and his armies. After the Battle of Earth, Nebula and Rocket left the Avengers and rejoined the newly revived Guardians. Alongside Thor, they continued to help those in need across the galaxy, such as the [[Indigarrians]] during the [[Battle of Indigarr]]. While Thor parted ways with the team to fight [[Gorr the God Butcher]], Nebula helped rebuild [[Knowhere]] into the Guardians' new headquarters. During this time, the Guardians marked their first Christmas celebration on Knowhere with [[Kevin Bacon]]. Nebula later joined the Guardians on a new mission once Knowhere came under assault by [[Adam Warlock]], who gravely wounded Rocket in a misguided attack on behalf of [[High Evolutionary]]. As a kill switch inside Rocket hindered his recovery, the Guardians journeyed to the [[Orgoscope]] and [[Counter-Earth]] to locate an override code that would disable the switch. Nebula contacted the alternate Gamora and the Ravagers for reinforcements. After the High Evolutionary destroyed Counter-Earth, Nebula and the other Guardians devised the means to save Rocket, and then defeated the High Evolutionary before liberating his imprisoned subjects from [[Arête Laboratories]]. Following their victory, Nebula resigned from the Guardians to help raise the [[Star Children]] with [[Drax the Destroyer|Drax]] on Knowhere. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Trained for Thanos==== [[File:Ne Tha 04.png|{{AltFloat|s=200}}|Nebula is tortured by [[Thanos]]]] {{Quote|My [[Thanos|father]] would have [[Gamora]] and me battle one another in training. Every time my sister prevailed, my father would replace a piece of me with machinery, claiming he wanted me to be her equal. But she won, again, and again, and again, never once refraining.|Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} When she was an infant, [[Thanos]] invaded Nebula's homeworld, murdering her whole family yet taking her to train her as a merciless warrior devoted to his service. While Nebula greatly despised her other adopted [[Black Order|siblings]], she formed a genuine bond with Gamora, to the point that they began to truly consider each other as sisters.{{Ref|GotGP1}} Days after the two were adopted, Gamora taught Nebula to tuck her head when she rolled as the two trained in the [[Sanctuary]]. She demonstrated for Nebula, who expressed worry what would happen if she was wrong. Gamora assured Nebula that she would not and offered her help. Nebula asked why she would help, given that Thanos wanted them to be opponents, but Gamora insisted that they would always be sisters. The two started working on Nebula's roll. [[File:Healing Tank.png|{{AltFloat}}|The daughters of [[Thanos]]]] Wanting his children to fight each other, Thanos pit Gamora and Nebula against each other in competitions. Thanos once forced the two to fight each other repeatedly over a period of three days, during which they were allowed only a small ration of water at regular intervals and one-half hour of sleep each day, without food. The fight lasted six days, and Thanos promised a piece of [[Yaro Root]] to whoever won the battle of the day. Nebula became overwhelmed with fury and attacked Gamora, managing to defeat her. Nebula felt sorry for Gamora, since both girls were starving, and decided to share her piece of food with Gamora. Thanos ordered Nebula to deliver the killing blow, and Nebula prepared to do it despite her compassion for Gamora. Thanos stopped her and congratulated her, but gave the whole Yaro Root to Gamora, explaining that Nebula was weak for hesitating to kill Gamora, which Gamora would not have done. Nebula cursed herself for being weak while Gamora ate the Yaro Root without sharing. Nebula embraced anger and started to let it control her life. [[File:Nebula vs Gamora Comic.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula trains with [[Gamora]]]] When Nebula was a child, Thanos once demanded that she say her name. However, she was too scared to speak, so Thanos ordered one of his [[Sakaaran]] guards to cut her ears off. That became the last sound she would truly hear. Her ears were then replaced with mechanical parts.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} Throughout her childhood, Nebula trained to be a Galaxy-class killer under the tutelage of [[Ronan the Accuser]]. Nebula would often train alongside Gamora and [[Korath]].{{Ref|GotGP1}} She looked up to Gamora, seeing her as the only person who knew what Nebula was experiencing.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} [[File:Dervani.PNG|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[Gamora]] spar]] Thanos regularly had Nebula spar with Gamora to test their strengths with Gamora winning every match. Every time Nebula lost, Thanos would upgrade her to try and make her Gamora's equal. Nebula grew to resent Gamora for never letting her win causing Thanos to torture her.{{Ref|GotGV2}} As she continued to grow up, Nebula would sarcastically call Thanos "dad" as a form of rebellion. As Nebula matured, the competitions between her and Gamora became more violent, as Nebula only cared about winning and surviving.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} [[File:Thanos Warriors.PNG|{{AltFloat}}|[[Thanos]]' warriors]] One training scenario on the arboreal world of [[Dervani]] saw Nebula and Gamora pitted against each other in a competition to retrieve a data ingot for Ronan. The girls sparred on the surface, leading to Gamora throwing Nebula off a cliff, severely injuring her and requiring multiple cybernetic replacements in order for her to live. Upon reaching adulthood, Nebula and Gamora served Thanos under the command of Korath. [[File:Nebulacomic.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula trapped in a [[Laser-Thorn Energy Net]]]] On a mission to locate the [[Orb]] on [[Praxius IX]], inside of one of the [[Cloud Tombs of Praxius]], Nebula went in without waiting for Gamora and fell into a trap. Ensnared by an impenetrable [[Laser-Thorn Energy Net]], Nebula found herself at the mercy of the inhabitants and needed to be rescued by Gamora. Never one to tolerate failure, Thanos ordered Gamora to leave Nebula behind, with only a sharp blade to free herself. Nebula was forced to amputate her own arm in order to escape the netting.{{Ref|GotGP1}} In a conversation between Gamora and Nebula, who fretted that Thanos was finally going after the stones, Gamora, who was entrusted to find the Soul Stone, relayed to Nebula that she located the [[Soul Stone]] through a map which she burned to prevent anyone from being able to access it. The two of them attempted to keep the secret from Thanos, however, the Mad Titan was secretly aware that Gamora found the Soul Stone, but allowed the two of them to believe that he was fooled.{{Ref|AIW}} ===[[Quest for the Orb]]=== ====Family Conquests==== [[File:THPS14.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula during the massacre of [[Korbin]]]] {{Quote|[[Thanos|Father]]'s found an [[Infinity Stones|Infinity Stone]]."
"Where?"
"On a planet called [[Morag]].|[[Gamora]] and Nebula|Avengers: Endgame}} In [[2014|August 2014]], under [[Thanos]]' orders, Nebula and [[Gamora]] participated in the [[Massacre of the Korbinites|cleansing]] of half of the [[Korbinites]]. During the skirmish, she managed to kill a few soldiers. However, she is attacked by an enemy soldier who threw a stray grenade in her direction, causing her to fall. Fortunately, Nebula was saved at the last minute by Gamora, who killed the enemy soldier. Extending a helping hand, Nebula scoffed at claimed not to have needed help, only for Gamora to remind her that she always needed her help. [[File:THPS30.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula is informed about the [[Power Stone]]]] The two daughters of Thanos then regrouped back on the [[Q-Ship]] after their mission was completed. Gamora learned about Thanos' success in locating the [[Power Stone]] on [[Morag]] and shared that information with Nebula, who then began to stress to Gamora that their adopted father would finally put his plan into effect to hunt for the [[Infinity Stones]]. However, Gamora assured Nebula that Thanos only found one of the stones at the moment and is yet to uncover the others. [[File:THPS35.png|{{AltFloat}}|Gamora and Nebula receive [[Thanos]]' orders]] As Nebula continued to fret over Thanos' plan, Thanos suddenly appeared on their Q-Ship as he wiped off the blood from his [[Double-Edged Sword|double-edged sword]]. As he approached his daughters, Thanos informed the two that his ally in the [[Kree Empire]], [[Ronan the Accuser]], had located the [[Orb]] and was therefore planning to dispatch his two daughters to Ronan's Kree ship — the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' — to oversee the retrieval of the Power Stone for him and deliver it to him. [[File:THPS37.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula displays her loyalty towards [[Thanos]]]] Gamora, however, pointed out that Ronan would be displeased with them being at his side during his [[Quest for the Orb|search for the Power Stone]]. Thanos then warned the two that Ronan's alternate was death if they refused, noting that his obsession with the [[Kree-Nova War]] clouded his judgments. Nebula then bowed down to Thanos and promised to not fail him, to which Thanos responded that she won't fail him.{{Ref|AE}} ====Following Ronan's Orders==== [[File:NebulawithRonan-GOTG.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula witnesses [[Ronan]]'s brutal execution]] {{Quote|You think I don't know? You would keep me from advancing! You would have [[Ronan the Accuser|Ronan]] tell [[Thanos|Father]] only Gamora furthers his great plan!"
"I will keep you alive!"
"Compassion? What would Ronan say to that?|Nebula and [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Nebula and [[Gamora]] left the [[Q-Ship]] and were dispatched to the ''[[Dark Aster]]'', belonging to [[Ronan the Accuser]], who made a deal to retrieve the [[Orb]] for Thanos so he would, in turn, destroy [[Xandar]]. As [[Korath]] returned to the ''Dark Aster'', having returned from [[Morag]], Nebula updated Ronan that he arrived back after which he concluded with the ritualistic execution of a [[Nova Corps]] [[Sacrifice Nova Corpsman|officer]] sent to negotiate the peace deal. [[File:Gamora, Ronan & Nebula.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula, [[Gamora]] and [[Ronan the Accuser]]]] Nebula, Gamora, and Ronan then listened to Korath as he reported that he had [[Battle of Morag|failed to retrieve]] the Orb on Morag, thanks to [[Star-Lord]]'s intervention, but informed the trio that, through his various sources, he believed that the Ravager would be selling the Orb to the [[Broker]] on Xandar. Ronan, ranting on how badly he wanted to destroy Xandar and wipe out all the Nova Corps as an act of vengeance for what the transgressions they committed against the [[Kree Empire]] and being responsible for the deaths of his family, tasked Nebula to retrieve the Orb from Star-Lord on Xandar and bring it to him on the ''Dark Aster'' once she recovered it. [[File:22.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula's reaction upon [[Gamora]] being sent]] As Nebula told him it would be an honor, Gamora resisted, reminding Ronan that he would have to stand in front of [[Thanos]] and report his failure if the Orb wasn't brought to him. Nebula, slightly offended by Gamora's statement, arrogantly claimed to be the daughter of Thanos just as Gamora. However, Ronan, considering Gamora's warning, instead sent Gamora to Xandar, threatening her with a severe punishment if she failed, despite the fact that she had never failed Thanos.{{Ref|GotG}} [[File:GotG T2 5.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula confronts and threatens [[Gamora]]]] When they left the meeting, Nebula confronted Gamora and they had a brief argument where they tried to break each other's fingers. Nebula accused her sister of now attempting to become Ronan's favorite and they argued over who was the superior killer. When Nebula mentioned that the screams of her victims could be heard across the galaxy, Gamora replied that it was because she took too long to kill them before walking away from Nebula.{{Ref|GotGDS}}{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} ====Meeting with Thanos==== [[File:The Other Hologram.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[Ronan]] listening to [[Other]]]] {{Quote|Thanks, [[Thanos|Dad]]. Sounds fair. This is one fight you won't win. Let's head to the [[Kyln]].|Nebula to [[Ronan the Accuser]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Ultimately, Nebula and [[Ronan]] realized through their sources that [[Gamora]] had been captured by the [[Nova Corps]] after her skirmish with [[Star-Lord]] on [[Xandar]]. She trained the ''[[Dark Aster]]'''s satellites on Xandar and listened as the prisoners, including Gamora, were discussed by the Corpsmen. The connection cut out, so Nebula hacked the Nova's communications and learned that the Guardians would be imprisoned at the [[Kyln]] as punishment.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} However, through communication with [[Other]], the two learned that she had betrayed him and instead planned to sell the [[Orb]] to a [[Collector|third party]]. Other then demanded the two travel to the [[Sanctuary]] and discuss the issue with Thanos in person as Ronan's alliance with the Mad Titan was at risk. [[File:Nebula-arm-repair.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula attends their meeting with [[Thanos]]]] On the Sanctuary, Nebula repaired her cybernetic arm while Ronan argued with Other, berating him and [[Thanos]] for claiming that she betrayed their cause, reminding the two that she lost the [[Attack on Peter Quill|battle]] against Star-Lord on Xandar, despite being a deadly assassin. Nebula then witnessed as Ronan snapped Other's neck, and she heard Ronan asking Thanos to understand the severity of the situation at hand. Thanos, unfazed by his servant's death, responded by threatening Ronan's life if he failed again. [[File:Thisisonefight youwon’twin.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[Ronan]] leave the [[Sanctuary]]]] Thanos then claimed that Ronan's obsession with the [[Kree-Nova War]] bored him, and heard him call Gamora his "favorite daughter," which irked her. Thanos promised to honor their agreement and supply Ronan with a formidable army, but threatened to "bathe the starways in his blood" if he failed again. As they left, Nebula thanked Thanos for the meeting and assured Ronan that he would lose a fight with her father, and insisted on heading to the [[Kyln]] so they could collect the [[Orb]].{{Ref|GotG}} ====Cleansing the Kyln==== [[File:Nebula-Klyn-Guard.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula brutally torturing the [[Kyln]]'s guards]] {{Quote|Send [[Necrocraft]] to every corner of the quadrant. Find the [[Orb]]. Any means, any price."
"And [[Kyln|this place]]?"
"The [[Nova Corps|Nova]] can't know what we're after. Cleanse it.|[[Ronan]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} After [[Ronan]] and Nebula left the [[Sanctuary]], they followed [[Other]]'s lead and arrived at the [[Kyln]], only to discover that [[Gamora]], [[Star-Lord]], and [[Drax the Destroyer|three]] [[Groot (Original)|other]] [[Rocket|individuals]] had [[Escape from the Kyln|escaped]] from the prison with the [[Orb]] in their possession. As a result, the Sakaarans took over the prison and interrogated the hostages in an attempt to gain information on Gamora's next destination. On the second floor, Nebula tortured a Nova Guard to gather more information. [[File:RonanNebula-CleansesKylnPrison.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula being ordered to "cleanse" the [[Kyln]]]] However, she suddenly received a message on her cybernetics that the [[Nova Corps]] were on their way to defend the prison. As they were leaving Ronan ordered Nebula to send their [[Necrocraft]] across the galaxy to search for Gamora through any necessary means. Nebula then asked him what to do with the prisoners, to which he responded to [[Massacre at the Kyln|cleanse the prison of all the guards and prisoners]] in an attempt to prevent the [[Nova Corps]] from realizing what they were after.{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Skirmish on Knowhere]]==== [[File:NPS0345 comp v021 grade.1104.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula arrives on [[Knowhere]] with [[Ronan]]]] {{Quote|You are a disappointment, sister. Of all our [[Black Order|siblings]], I hated you least."
"Nebula, please. If [[Ronan the Accuser|Ronan]] gets [[Power Stone|this stone]], he'll kill us all."
"Not all. You will already be dead.|Nebula and [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Following the orders of [[Ronan the Accuser]], Nebula and [[Korath]] continued their search for the [[Orb]] across the galaxy on board the ''[[Dark Aster]]''.{{Ref|GotG}} Nebula asked Ronan if he wondered why [[Thanos]] wanted the Orb, but Ronan simply said that it was not his place. They received a message from [[Drax the Destroyer]], challenging Ronan to face his death on [[Knowhere]]. Nebula explained that it was the person that [[Gamora]] and the other prisoners escaped with, so Ronan concluded that the Orb was with them and that they would thus go retrieve it from them.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} Upon arriving onboard [[Necrocraft]] and their army of [[Sakaarans]], they were spotted by Gamora and her [[Guardians of the Galaxy|new team]], who escaped into a [[Mining Pods|mining pod]] while Nebula gave chase with her small army. [[File:NebulaSkirmishonKnowhere1.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula is ordered to retrieve the [[Orb]]]] While Ronan decided to stay behind on Knowhere and fight Drax, whose [[Ovette|wife]] and [[Kamaria|daughter]] had been [[Massacre of Drax's Species|killed]] by the [[Kree]] under [[Thanos]]'s orders, Nebula was ordered by Ronan to retrieve the Orb from Gamora. Following his orders, Nebula lead a squad of soldiers in fighter ships to chase Gamora across Knowhere. After having identified the correct ship that was piloted by Gamora, she seized it, and ordered the [[Sakaarans]] to shoot it down. [[File:Nebula-Pilot.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula relentlessly chases after [[Gamora]]]] Ultimately, Nebula [[Skirmish on Knowhere|chased Gamora throughout the mining colony]], while Rocket Raccoon and Star Lord managed to destroy several Necrocrafts. Ultimately, Nebula managed to overwhelm Gamora, who decided to go out into deep space in an attempt to evade Nebula and Ronan's forces. However, Nebula and the Sakaarans continued to pursue her, shooting in her direction, and ultimately they managed to corner her ship. Ultimately, Nebula managed to corner Gamora's space pod, and expressed her bitter sentiment at her, claiming that out of all of their siblings in the [[Black Order]], she hated her the least. [[File:Nebula-chases-Gamora-GotG.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula destroys [[Gamora]]'s [[Mining Pods|mining pod]]]] Gamora pleaded Nebula to reconsider her alliance with Ronan, warning her that he would kill everyone if he obtained the [[Power Stone]], only for Nebula to declare that she would already be dead, before destroying her ship. Leaving Gamora for dead in space, who was eventually rescued by [[Star-Lord]] and the [[Ravagers]], Nebula retrieved the Orb and traveled back to Knowhere to update Ronan on her successes as he reigned victorious in his fight against Drax.{{Ref|GotG}} Nebula assured herself that Gamora was dead and felt nothing of it.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} ====Betraying Thanos==== [[File:RonanNebulaKorath-Thanos.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula witnessing [[Ronan]] betray [[Thanos]]]] {{Quote|After [[Xandar]], you're going to kill my [[Thanos|father]]?"
"You dare to oppose me?"
"You've seen what he's turned me into. You kill him, and I will help you destroy a thousand planets.|Nebula and [[Ronan]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} After the [[Skirmish on Knowhere]], Nebula returned to the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' and presented [[Ronan]] with the [[Orb]]. Both her and [[Korath]] were present when Ronan contacted [[Thanos]] and updated the Mad Titan on his success on [[Knowhere]]. When Thanos told Ronan to bring the Orb to him, Ronan ignored his demands and instead informed Thanos that he was aware that the Orb contained [[Power Stone|one]] of the six [[Infinity Stones]], which shocked both Korath and Nebula. [[File:Nebula-Orb-Explosion.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula witnesses [[Ronan the Accuser|Ronan]] opens up the [[Orb]]]] To Thanos' horror, Ronan ripped the Orb open to reveal the [[Power Stone]], which he observed while Korath warned him that he should not double-cross Thanos as he was the most powerful being in the universe. Ronan assured him that with the Power Stone, he was more powerful than the Mad Titan. Ronan then proceeded to harness the stone's power and attached it to his Cosmi-Rod, as he was strong enough to wield its power. [[File:Nebula12.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula vowing her loyalty towards [[Ronan]]]] Ronan then announced that he would destroy [[Xandar]] with the Power Stone, ending the existence of the [[Nova Corps]] and the status of the [[Kree-Nova War]] before personally threatening to kill Thanos shortly after. When the Mad Titan ended the transmission, Nebula, satisfied with his promise to kill Thanos, offered her total loyalty to Ronan should he succeed, swearing to help him destroy a thousand planets.{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Battle of Xandar]]==== [[File:Nebula-Dark-Aster-Explosion.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula witnesses the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]] attack]] {{Quote|The starboard kern has been breached! We have been boarded!"
"Continue our approach."
"But the [[Nova Corps]] have engaged!"
"None of that will matter once we reach the surface.|Nebula and [[Ronan the Accuser]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} As the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' approached the atmosphere of [[Xandar]], a fleet of [[Ravagers]] lead by [[Yondu Udonta]] and [[Star-Lord]] engaged them. Nebula then warned Ronan of their presence. The fleet fired a blot of flame to disguise their moves, but Nebula saw that they had dived under the ship and she ordered all their fighters to destroy the ships. [[File:RonanNebula-NovaCorpsAttack.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula receives orders from [[Ronan]]]] Once they received word that the side of the ship had been breached, Nebula tried to convince [[Ronan the Accuser]] to retaliate but he refused, stating that his focus was to land on the planet's surface so he could finally destroy it. Nebula considered Ronan's plans and ordered the Sakaarans to seal the security doors so the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] could not reach Ronan. Deciding to take matters into her own hands, Nebula took a squad of soldiers with her to engage the attackers before shutting the door, locking in Ronan. [[File:Nebula-challenges-Gamora.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula challenges all of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]]]] While the [[Sakaarans]] protected the ship, Nebula decided to confront the Guardians of the Galaxy herself. When [[Star-Lord]], [[Gamora]], [[Rocket]] and [[Drax]] breached the ship, Nebula confronted them. As Nebula began to insult her former sister, she was silenced when Drax shot her with a rocket, sending her flying backward and damaging her body while allowing the Guardians to continue on their mission.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Dueling Gamora==== [[File:S5b3.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula prepares to fight against [[Gamora]]]] {{Quote|Sister! Help us fight [[Ronan the Accuser|Ronan]]! You know he is crazy!"
"I know you're both crazy.|[[Gamora]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} The shot fired by [[Drax the Destroyer]] caused Nebula's entire body to be damaged, but her cybernetic implants helped to repair her within moments, twisting her arm and jaw back into place,{{Ref|GotG}} although she winced in pain as the organic parts of her arm still hurt.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} Once she was repaired Nebula began to fight [[Gamora]], using her electrified batons against Gamora's [[Godslayer]]. During their fight against each other, the side of the ship was suddenly torn apart by an explosion as the [[Battle of Xandar]] between the [[Yondu Ravager Clan]] and the [[Sakaarans]] continued on. [[File:GamoraVsNebula.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula nearly kills [[Gamora]]]] During their fight, Gamora attempted to unlock an armored door to assist the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], however, Nebula did all she could to delay this action. Eventually, Nebula managed to gain the upper hand by disarming Gamora and then using her batons to electrocute Gamora, nearly killing her. However, Gamora regained her strength and knocked her outside of the hole in the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' and leaving Nebula hanging onto the edge. [[File:Nebula-YoureBothCrazy.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula escapes from the ''[[Dark Aster]]'']] As Nebula hung hundreds of feet above [[Xandar]]'s surface, with her hand trapped onto a spike, Gamora tried to convince her to fight against [[Ronan the Accuser]], claiming Ronan was crazy. But Nebula refused, citing they were both crazy and cut off her cybernetic hand. However, instead of falling from the sky to her death, she landed on top of a Ravager's [[M-Ships|M-Ship]]. Nebula then threw the [[List of Minor Characters/Phase Two#Guardians of the Galaxy|pilot]] out and took control of the ship before flying it far away from the battle.{{Ref|GotG}} Not wanting to be the subject of [[Thanos]]'s disappointment, Nebula fled the battle.{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} ===Finding Acceptance=== ====Captured by the Sovereign==== [[File:NebulaGamora GOTG22017.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula is given to [[Gamora]]]] {{Quote|I understand she is your sister?"
