[[File:BW Leader of Avengers 5.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula participating in a meeting]] In [[2023|October 2023]], Nebula and Rocket participated in a hologram conference alongside [[James Rhodes]], Danvers, and [[Okoye]]. During the conference, she voiced her frustration at Danvers for sending them into such a situation. At the conference's end, she and Rocket returned to patrol.{{Ref|AE}} ===[[Time Heist]]=== ====Discussing the Infinity Stones==== [[File:Nebula meets Scott Lang.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula warns [[War Machine]] about [[Ant-Man]]]] {{Quote|[[Thanos]] found the [[Soul Stone]] on [[Vormir]]."
"What's Vormir?"
"A dominion of death, at the very center of [[Celestial]] existence. It's where... Thanos [[Sacrifice of Gamora|murdered]] [[Gamora|my sister]].|Nebula and [[Natasha Romanoff]]|Avengers: Endgame}} A few days later, Nebula and [[Rocket]] were summoned by [[Natasha Romanoff]] and returned to [[Earth]] landing at the [[Avengers Compound]]. Upon arriving, she came across [[Scott Lang]] eating a taco outside. He stated that their ship was awesome; she then sarcastically transmitted a message on her earpiece to [[James Rhodes]], advising him to be careful entering the landing zone, before regrouping with Romanoff and [[Steve Rogers]]. Shortly they were joined by new arrivals of [[Clint Barton]] and [[Thor]], along with [[Bruce Banner]], Lang, Rocket, and [[Tony Stark]] in a debriefing room. [[File:Time Heist Brainstorm 17.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula listens to [[Thor]] talk about the [[Aether]]]] The Avengers discussed the history of the [[Infinity Stones]]. As such, they learned from Thor that the [[Aether]] was originally owned by the [[Dark Elves]] of [[Svartalfheim]], but it was [[First Dark Elf Conflict|taken away]] by the [[Asgardians]], who hid it in a [[Chamber|secret chamber]] until Thor's [[Jane Foster|ex-girlfriend]] uncovered it and became its next host. Through Rocket, they learned that the [[Power Stone]] was [[Battle of Morag|stolen]] by [[Peter Quill]] on [[Morag]]. [[File:Nebula (2023).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula explains the [[Soul Stone]]'s [[Vormir|location]]]] When Romanoff asked about the [[Soul Stone]], Nebula solemnly stated that it was located on an isolated planet called [[Vormir]], and she also proceeded to inform them that Vormir was the location from which Thanos [[Sacrifice of Gamora|murdered]] her [[Gamora|sister]]. As they tested the [[Time Suit]], Nebula adjusted the inner functions for Barton, while Banner educated Rhodes and Lang about [[time travel]] mechanics. Following Barton's successful test run through the Avengers' [[Quantum Tunnel]] in the Compound's hangar, they continued to plan out their mission. [[File:Nebula (Avenger).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula before entering the [[Quantum Realm]]]] After reexamining the information about the Infinity Stones across their respective encounters, Banner, Stark, Rogers, and Romanoff managed to narrow down three periods where each stone are aligned with three small teams: [[2012/New York Time Heist|2012]] with the [[Mind Stone|Mind]], [[Space Stone|Space]], and [[Time Stone|Time]] Stones; [[2013/Asgard Time Heist|2013]] with the [[Reality Stone]]; and [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|2014]] with the [[Power Stone]] on [[Morag]] and the [[Soul Stone]] on [[Vormir]]. With the plan finally set in motion, Nebula, along with the Avengers, suited up in the Time Suits, and went to the Quantum Tunnel in the hangar, where Rogers gave them a speech. They then entered the [[Quantum Realm]] and used the [[Time Travel|Time-Space GPS]] to travel it.{{Ref|AE}} ====Arriving on Morag==== [[File:War Machine with Nebula.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[War Machine]] arriving on [[Morag]]]] {{Quote|We're not the only ones in [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|2014]] looking for the [[Infinity Stones|stones]]."
"Wait a minute, what are you talking about right now? Who else is looking for these stones?"
"My [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|father]], my [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|sister]]... and [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|me]].|Nebula and [[War Machine]]|Avengers: Endgame}} Nebula, along with [[James Rhodes]], [[Natasha Romanoff]], and [[Clint Barton]], arrived in an [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate 2014 timeline]]. The four used the now enlarged ''[[Benatar]]'' to fly off that timeline's [[Earth]] to [[Morag]]. Nebula and Rhodes then brought the ''Benatar'''s [[Benatar's Space Pod|space pod]] down in case they needed it and were hurried by Romanoff and Barton who reminded them that they needed to speed it up. [[File:THPS8.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[War Machine]] are teamed up]] Rhodes jokingly claimed that all of their complaints were not helpful to [[Time Heist|their mission]]. The four then proceeded to wish each other luck in obtaining the Stones, before Romanoff and Barton departed for [[Vormir]]. Nebula and Rhodes observed as the two quickly left the desolate planet, with Nebula noting that she had supplied the two with the coordinates for Vormir and that the two would only need to survive the jump point. [[File:THPS12.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[War Machine]] discuss the plan]] Rhodes reviewed the plan and asked Nebula if they were supposed to wait for [[Peter Quill]] to arrive on Morag and allow him to lead him to the location of the [[Power Stone]], to which Nebula responded that they should take cover. Nebula reminded him that there were others searching for the Stones.{{Ref|AE}} ====[[Theft of the Power Stone]]==== [[File:TOFPS 9.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula steals [[Peter Quill]]'s equipment]] {{Quote|I wasn't always like this."
"Me either. But we work with what we got, right?|Nebula and [[War Machine]]|Avengers: Endgame}} Nebula and [[James Rhodes]] observed as [[Peter Quill]] arrived on Morag while dancing to his [[Star-Lord's Walkman|Walkman]]. As he continued his dance, Rhodes nodded his head in thought and commented on Quill being an idiot. Deciding to end the nonsense, Rhodes intervened and punched Quill, knocking him unconscious as Nebula looted his thief tools to enter the [[Temple Vault]]. [[File:Nebulagrabbingtheorb..png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula stealing the [[Orb]] from the forcefield]] As the two finally entered the vault, Rhodes, having seen too many movies, was hesitant to enter, urging Nebula to be wary of traps, only for her to shake her head in annoyance, and she casually walked into the chamber, dismissing his fears of the imaginary booby traps. Exploring the [[Temple Vault]], she located the [[Orb]] being protected by a force field. She approached it and reached in the pedestal, bypassing the incineration field and [[Theft of the Power Stone|retrieved]] the Orb at the cost of her arm getting severely burnt. [[File:TOFPS 29.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula is trapped in an [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate 2014]]]] As Rhodes witnessed her cyborg hand at its base mechanics, she remarked how she did not used to be like how she is now; a sentiment Rhodes shared. Synchronizing their GPS's, Rhodes activated his, but Nebula was unable to, as the probing of her alternate self's memories caused her cybernetics to malfunction. With their memories intertwined, she witnessed an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]] researching her memories through the shared network.{{Ref|AE}} ====[[Kidnapping of Nebula|Evil Nebula Strikes]]==== [[File:TOFPS 37.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula tries to send a warning to [[Black Widow|her]] [[Hawkeye|team]]]] {{Quote|[[Clint Barton|Barton]], come in. [[Natasha Romanoff|Romanoff]], come in, we have a problem. Come in, we have a prob– [[Thanos]] knows.|Nebula|Avengers: Endgame}} Awakening from her memory link, a horrified Nebula stormed out of the [[Temple Vault]] and sought refuge in the ''[[Benatar]]'''s [[Benatar's Space Pod|space pod]], rushing to warn [[Clint Barton]] and [[Natasha Romanoff]] that an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]] was aware of their plans. However, moments later, an alternate ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' descended on Morag and beamed her up in the pod. [[File:NebulaVsNebula.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula being confronted by her past self]] As Nebula was interrogated by her alternate [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|self]], the younger took offense to her future self for betraying [[Thanos]]' goals. As Nebula tried to talk to [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]], she was knocked down by her alternate self. Threatening her with a knife, instead of killing or torturing her future incarnation, the alternate Nebula instead removed superficial armor plating to equip to herself, and snatched her vial of [[Pym Particles]] from her.{{Ref|AE}} ====Freed by Gamora==== [[File:2023 Nebula.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula is approached by [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|2014]] [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]]] {{Quote|Tell me something. In the future, what happens to you and me?"
"I tried to kill you. Several times. But eventually, we become friends. We become sisters.|Nebula to [[Gamora]]|Avengers: Endgame}}[[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] went to an incarcerated Nebula, asking her about their history, remembering Nebula's cryptic message to her about [[Sacrifice of Gamora|her fate]]. Nebula proceeded to inform Gamora that she tried to kill her and her [[Guardians of the Galaxy|friends]] on multiple occasions. [[File:Nebula & Gamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula is freed from captivity by [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]]] Soon after, Gamora received an honest and heartfelt truth: it was her genuine sisterly love and openness during [[Ego's Expansion]] that allowed Nebula to become someone better, allowing the two to finally be real sisters. Processing the information, Gamora extended her hand to Nebula, giving her confidence that they could work together. Nebula accepted help that her alternate self would have rejected. [[File:07D93A93-FA81-4EE8-9821-D55A8E02F3CB.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula shoots and kills her [[Nebula/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate self]]]] Nebula witnessed the [[Avengers Compound]]'s destruction and led Gamora into the Compound's underground tunnels, where they found her alternate self with [[Clint Barton]]. Assessing the situation, she defended Barton, and held her alternate self at gun point, letting Barton get out of the way with the [[Nano Gauntlet]] to observe the confrontation at a distance. As Nebula attempted to urge her alternate self to lay down her arms, noting the shared memory network, her alternate self couldn't fathom such a future with her counterpart's mindset. Gamora stood down to show good faith and appealed to her sister, but it was all in vain as her alternate self aimed to shoot at her sister. In reflex, Nebula shot her alternate self through the cardiac region, killing her.{{Ref|AE}} ====[[Battle of Earth]]==== [[File:Him or a Tree.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[Gamora]] join the battle]] {{Quote|This is the [[Star-Lord|one]]? Seriously?"
"Your choices were him or a [[Groot|tree]].|[[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] and Nebula|Avengers: Endgame}} Nebula and Gamora then left and joined the [[Battle of Earth|battle]]. At one point, Gamora saved [[Star-Lord|Peter Quill]] from a [[Sakaaran]] soldier who ambushed him. Quill, unaware that it was an alternate version, attempted to hug her, only for Gamora to knee him and warn him not to touch her. Nebula nonchalantly confirmed to Gamora that her [[Gamora|main counterpart]] fell in love with Quill, stating that it was a choice between Quill and [[Groot]]. [[File:A-Force.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula assists [[Captain Marvel]] in battle]] When [[Carol Danvers]] arrived, she was tasked with returning the [[Nano Gauntlet]] to the [[Quantum Tunnel]]. Nebula, along with Gamora, [[Pepper Potts]], [[Valkyrie]], [[Wanda Maximoff]], [[Mantis]], [[Wasp]], [[Shuri]], and [[Okoye]], came to Danvers' aid and attempted to protect the Gauntlet from the army, fighting them in the process. However, Thanos ultimately managed to prevent their efforts and destroyed the Tunnel with his [[Double-Edged Sword]]. [[File:Nebula, Quill & Valkyrie.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula kneels before a fallen [[Tony Stark]]]] However, Thanos and his entire army were wiped out when [[Tony Stark]] used all six [[Infinity Stones]], sacrificing himself in the process.{{Ref|AE}} Every hero, including Nebula, knelt out of respect for Stark's sacrifice.{{Ref|AEDS}} ===Member of the Guardians=== ====Team Reassembled==== [[File:Guardians (Avengers Endgame).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula attending [[Tony Stark]]'s funeral]] {{Quote|You should fight [[Star-Lord|one]] [[Thor|another]] for the honor of leadership."
"Sounds fair.|[[Drax the Destroyer]] and Nebula|Avengers: Endgame}} A week later, Nebula attended [[Tony Stark]]'s funeral at the [[Stark Eco-Compound]] and stood alongside the reunited [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. [[File:Nebula (Endgame).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula suggests [[Thor]] and [[Star-Lord]] fight]] Following the official dissolution of the [[Avengers]], Nebula rejoined the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] in the [[Benatar]] along with [[Rocket]], [[Drax]], [[Mantis]], [[Groot]], and [[Peter Quill]]. They traveled to [[Tønsberg]], [[Norway]] to pick up [[Thor]], who joined the Guardians. Thor and Quill briefly quarreled about who the leader was, prompting Nebula to suggest that the two fight for the title. The Guardians were set out to find the alternate Gamora.{{Ref|AE}} Nebula's time on [[Earth]] acting as an [[Avengers|Avenger]] resulted in the citizens learning of her existence, and she was featured at the [[New Jersey AvengerCon]].{{Ref|MM101}} Sometime later Nebula would come in contact with Gamora and remain in touch with her.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Adventures in the Galaxy==== [[File:Asgardians of the Galaxy L&T.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula with [[Thor]] and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]]] Over the next two years,{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} Nebula and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] welcomed [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] into the team, while helping [[Thor]] lose weight and get back into shape. At one point, they let Thor pull the ''[[Benatar]]'' for strength training. During a journey to a swamp-filled planet, Nebula and her teammates fought off swamp robotic creatures while Thor watched from his perch on a rock.{{Ref|TLaT}} ====[[Battle of Indigarr|Time on Indigarr]]==== [[File:Nebula and Drax.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula fighting [[Booskans]] on [[Indigarr]]]] In [[2025]], at [[Thor]]’s request, the Guardians traveled to [[Indigarr]], thinking it would be a "relaxing holiday," but ended up facing [[Habooska the Horrible]] and his army, they were also accompanied by [[Korg]], [[Thor]]'s friend. Taking cover from enemy fire, Nebula then listened as Thor gave a speech to King [[Yakan]] of the [[Indigarrians]] and then single-handedly defeated Habooska and his army, accidentally destroying the [[Sacred Temple]] in the process. After saving the Indigarrians, Nebula and the rest of the Guardians received the thanks of King Yakan.{{Ref|TLaT}} ====Answering Distress Calls==== [[File:Guardians (Thor 4).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula sees [[Thor]] a final time before leaving]] {{Quote|Take care of my [[Guardians of the Galaxy|crew]]. This is gonna be hard for them."
"Hurry up!"
"Not her.|[[Thor]] and Nebula to [[Star-Lord]]|Thor: Love and Thunder}} In the ''[[Benatar]]'', the Guardians argued with Thor for bringing [[Toothgrinder]] and [[Toothgnasher]], with Nebula and [[Mantis]] wanting to kill the goats, only to be stopped by Thor and accidentally shooting [[Korg]]. Later, the Guardians watched the calls for help in horror, discovering that several gods were being killed by [[Gorr the God Butcher]]. Before answering the calls, Thor leaves the team to save [[Sif]] and the Guardians said goodbye to Thor before leaving.{{Ref|TLaT}} ===Operating from Knowhere=== ====Buying Knowhere==== {{Quote|Ever since buying [[Knowhere]] from the [[Collector]], we don't have time for trivialities like Christmas. This place needs a lot of fixing up before it's liveable.|Nebula|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] bought [[Knowhere]] from the [[Collector]] to rebuild it after it was destroyed by [[Thanos]]. The Guardians were also joined by a superpowered [[Dogs|dog]] named [[Cosmo]] and they acquired a new [[Bowie|ship]] as their main source of transportation. By [[2025]], Nebula had removed her bronze-colored superficial armor plating.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====Celebrating Christmas==== [[File:GOTG Holiday Special (4).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula expresses her feelings on Christmas]] {{Quote|[[Winter Soldier|Bucky]]'s [[Winter Soldier's Prosthetic Arm|arm]]?"
"Merry Christmas.|[[Rocket]] and Nebula|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} In [[2025|December 2025]], Nebula listened to [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]'s story about [[Peter Quill]]'s first Christmas in space. As [[Mantis]] spoke about celebrating Christmas to cheer up [[Peter Quill]], Nebula stated that they had no time for trivialities like Christmas since they were too busy fixing [[Knowhere]].{{Ref|TGotGHS}} However, Nebula's opinion soon changed as she took a trip to Earth to obtain a present for [[Rocket]]. Locating [[Bucky Barnes]], she fought the super soldier and stole his [[vibranium]] [[Winter Soldier's Prosthetic Arm|arm]] from him.[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1596623640958640128 James Gunn on Twitter - November 26, 2022][https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1596631007452692480 James Gunn on Twitter - November 26, 2022] [[File:Nebula Christmas.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula turns on the Christmas lights]] Returning to Knowhere, she helped Mantis, who had got [[Kevin Bacon]] from [[Earth]]. Nebula helped set up Knowhere and decorate it. When Quill came out, Nebula lifted a lever which turned the Christmas lights on. Quill was amazed until he saw that they kidnapped Bacon. When Mantis released the mind control, Bacon ran. Quill told Nebula and the others to get him and she was already on it, asking her to not kill him. [[File:Merry Christmas Nebula.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula gives [[Rocket]] her gift]] When they got Bacon back, he wanted to go home, but changed his mind and instead celebrated with the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. During the celebration, Nebula wrapped Barnes' arm and dropped it at [[Rocket]]'s feet. When he saw the arm, he was amazed what she did for him. Later, [[Groot]] gave Nebula a gift. She opened it to find a wood carving of her witnessing Quill opening up his present. In the end, they all hugged Bacon. As he left, Nebula remarked that not all actors were horrible people.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====New Upgrades==== {{Quote|I have a few upgrades courtesy of that [[Rocket|gutted badger]] in the Med-Bay.|Nebula to [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} After Christmas, [[Rocket]] spent time helping Nebula by improving and modifying her cybernetic enhancements. He removed the hardware on the left side of Nebula's face, and he also built her a new arm capable of changing shape to serve various functions.[https://www.allure.com/story/guardians-of-the-galaxy-volume-3-hair-makeup In ''Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3'', Nebula’s Makeup Tells Rocket’s Unwritten Backstory] ====Taking Charge==== [[File:Nebula & Groot put up sign.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula working on rebuilding [[Knowhere]]]] {{Quote|Is [[Peter Quill|Peter]] okay?"
"I don't know."
"What are you going to do?"
"Me? He's your brother.|[[Mantis]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Into [[2026]], the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] continued working to rebuild [[Knowhere]] and turn it into a base of operations for the team. However, during this time, [[Peter Quill]] fell into a deep depression, still not over the loss of [[Gamora]], rendering him incapable of leading the Guardians. With Quill unavailable, the rest of the team looked to Nebula, who was leading the rebuild of Knowhere. [[File:Nebula looking at Quill.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula takes care of a depressed [[Peter Quill]]]] Due to his depression, Quill would spend his time drinking in the bar until he passed out, forcing Nebula to have to carry him to his room on multiple occasions, much to the concern of the other Guardians. One day when Nebula put Quill to bed, he touched her arm, thinking she was Gamora, and told her he loved her, which made saddened Nebula. Rocket asked Nebula what she was going to do about Quill, but she rejected that responsibility. [[Mantis]] then asked Nebula about Quill, but she once again turned the questioning away from her.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====[[Attack on Rocket|Adam Warlock's Attack]]==== [[File:Nebula in flight.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula orders [[Adam Warlock]] to stand down]] {{Quote|That hurts."
"What a pity.|[[Adam Warlock]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} That night, Nebula witnessed [[Rocket]] be attacked by [[Adam Warlock]] in the street, so she rushed to the armory and equipped a [[Knowhere Jetpack|jetpack]] and flew up to Adam, ordering him to stand down. Nebula fired a blast at him, but Adam he got straight back up and tackled her, slamming her into the ground. Adam then began to savagely beat Nebula while the citizens of [[Knowhere]] cried out for him to stop. [[File:Nebula scanning data.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula discovers [[Rocket]] has a kill switch]] Adam threw Nebula into a building. The impact disfigured Nebula's limbs, but once they reset back into place, she got up and returned to the fight, where Adam was now beating [[Drax the Destroyer]]. As Nebula approached Adam, she turned her arm into a blade, and stabbed him through the chest. This stopped Adam, who collapsed in defeat. Nebula then rushed to the armory, where Rocket was being hurt by the [[Med-Paks|Med-Pak]]. They took Rocket to the Med-Bay in the ''[[Bowie]]'', where they discovered he had a kill switch inside him and that they needed a passkey from [[OrgoCorp]] to save him, so they left immediately.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ===Saving Rocket=== ====Reunited with Gamora==== [[File:Nebula Volume 3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula reunited with the alternate [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]]] {{Quote|Nebula, why would you not tell me that you've been in contact with [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]?"
"Because I didn't want you to get freaked out.|[[Peter Quill]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} While traveling in the ''[[Bowie]]'', Nebula secretly contacted the [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Gamora]] and the [[United Ravagers]] to help them, with Gamora having joined the Ravagers after the [[Battle of Earth]]. Once they arrived at the [[Orgoscope]], Nebula identified three layers of security shields, so [[Peter Quill]] bypassed them. But once they were through, their ship was stopped by the Ravagers, who proceeded to board them, unaware of who they were. Nebula informed the Ravagers they had an appointment with Gamora, who greeted the Guardians, much to Quill's shock. [[File:Nebula changing clotes.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula listening to the infiltration plan]] Provided with [[OrgoCorp]] uniforms, the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] listened to [[Stakar Ogord]] explain the infiltration plan, in which Gamora would be joining them. Quill asked Nebula why she didn't tell him she was in contact with Gamora, but she knew that it would only freak him out. Donning [[Space Suit]]s, the Guardians, with Gamora, descending onto the Orgoscope, where Nebula used her arm to cut into the surface to create an entry for them. As she worked, Quill talked to Gamora about their relationship, unaware that the rest of the Guardians could all hear.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====[[Infiltration into the Orgoscope|Infiltrating the Orgoscope]]==== [[File:Guardians discovered.png|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] in [[Orgoscope]]]] {{Quote|God! [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Past Gamora]]'s just mean!"
"She was always like that, and yet, I was the bad guy.|[[Peter Quill]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} After getting inside, they were immediately discovered by Master [[Karja]], but they were able to maintain their cover. However, they did lose their [[Space Suit]]s, causing Nebula to yell at [[Mantis]], as she put them in the decontamination pod that released them into space. They then split into two teams, with Nebula, [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] and [[Peter Quill]] retrieving the passkey, while [[Drax the Destroyer]] and Mantis accessed the spaceport so they could escape. Nebula stayed back and watched as Gamora forced [[Ura]] to lead them to the files after Quill failed to charm her into helping. [[File:Nebula looks at Quill.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula rejects [[Peter Quill]]'s brief affection]] As they waited for [[Rocket]]'s file, Quill pestered and compared Gamora about the [[Gamora|other version]] of her that he loved, which frustrated her, and she claimed that it sounded more like Nebula that he was describing. Nebula and Quill scoffed at the suggestion, but then she noticed Quill looking at her longingly, so she snapped at him to stop. They obtained the file, but as they went to leave, they were surrounded by guards. Using Ura as a hostage, they escaped into an elevator, and Nebula contacted [[Groot]] and told him to pick them up in the ''[[Bowie]]''. [[File:Star-Lord & Nebula.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula and [[Peter Quill]] escape [[Orgoscope]]]] Exiting the elevator, the three discovered Drax and Mantis fighting against the [[Orgosentries]], so Nebula went to help them, while Quill and Gamora headed to the security hub. Nebula fired at multiple guards, but when Drax was heavily injured, she rushed to help him. A Orgosentry shot Nebula in the back, greatly wounding her. Master Karja told the three to surrender, so they complied. Before they could be arrested, the Orgosentries' suits began to malfunction, thanks to Quill. The Bowie arrived at their location and the Guardians were able to escape, with Nebula being helped by Quill.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Visiting Counter-Earth==== [[File:Nebula sad.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula seeing [[Rocket]]'s suffering]] {{Quote|[[Counter-Earth|This]] is the perfect society?|Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} On the ''[[Bowie]]'', Nebula recovered from her wound and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] viewed [[Rocket]]'s file, and witnessed in horror the torture that he underwent at the hands of the [[High Evolutionary]]. Nebula commented that what Rocket went through was worse than anything [[Thanos]] did to her. She then saw that the passkey had recently been deleted by [[Theel]], so they decided to track him down and recover it. [[File:GOTG (Vol. 3).png|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] arrive at [[Counter-Earth]]]] [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] objected to the plan, and when she attacked [[Peter Quill]], Nebula stopped her. Gamora reminded her that she was family, but Nebula stated that Rocket was as well to her, so Gamora stormed off. Nebula checked on Rocket in the Med-Bay, whose lungs had filled with fluid, so she treated him, but noted that he was close to dying. Donning their uniforms, the Guardians arrived at [[Counter-Earth]], where they encountered the [[Humanimals]] and were invited into [[Neelie]]'s [[Neelie's House|house]]. [[File:This is the perfect society?.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula sees the depravity of [[Counter-Earth]]]] As they sat down, Quill attempted to communicate their mission to save Rocket, who Nebula displayed a hologram of with her arm. [[Mantis]] tried to help with, but Nebula criticized her. They were directed to [[Arête Laboratories]], so Nebula joined Quill and [[Groot]] to find Theel while [[Drax the Destroyer]] and Mantis stayed to protect Rocket. Using Neelie's car, they drove to Arête Laboratories, Nebula, Quill, and Groot looked around at Counter-Earth and saw only crime, homelessness, and violence, causing Nebula to doubt how it could be considered the perfect society. [[File:Nebula looking up.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula watches [[Arête Laboratories]] ascend]] Once they arrived, they were stopped by [[War Pig]] and [[Behemoth]], who told Nebula she had to stay behind due to her arm being a weapon. Nebula waited outside as Quill and Groot went inside. When Arête Laboratories began to rise, Nebula told Drax and Mantis to get the ship to her location, but she was disappointed to discover them standing behind her. With the planet exploding all around them, Nebula, Drax and Mantis ran towards Arête Laboratories to rescue Quill and Groot.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Captured by the High Evolutionary==== [[File:Nebula contacts gamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula rushes towards [[Arête Laboratories]]]] {{Quote|You're no better. The only thing we can count on you for is when someone shows weakness, you'll be right there to support it."
"Fine, I don't care. I know you need to find fault in everyone else to make yourself feel okay, so find it in me.|Nebula and [[Mantis]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Nebula contacted [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] and told her to take off without them. The three jumped onto [[Arête Laboratories]] but were unable to get inside as it ascended into space. Before the trio passed out from lack of oxygen, [[Drax the Destroyer]] was able to break down the door, where they discovered [[Star Children|children]] locked in cages. [[File:NebulaDraxMantis.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula becomes angry at [[Drax]] and [[Mantis]]]] Nebula pushed and yelled at Drax for disobeying orders and began to berate him for being stupid, saying that it made him a liability due to contributing nothing else. [[Mantis]] defended him, so Nebula insulted her as well, claiming that she only supported weakness. But Mantis didn't care and called out Nebula for always being critical of everyone to make herself feel better. Nebula initially lashed out back at Mantis, but then listened as she continued to explain how despite Drax being stupid, he loved them all and was the only one of them that didn't hate himself. [[File:Nebula emotional.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula learns that [[Rocket]] is alive]] The group freed the [[Star Children]] and Nebula eventually contacted [[Peter Quill]], who told her that he had already escaped from Arête Laboratories. They then overheard [[Rocket]]'s voice, and Quill confirmed that he was alive, causing Nebula to quietly cry tears of relief and joy. The tender moment was cut short when the [[High Evolutionary]] arrived and knocked Nebula, Drax, and Mantis unconscious, and threw them in a pit. [[File:Nebula yells at children.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula fails to talk to the [[Star Children]]]] They were found by some of the children that escaped, so Nebula tried to warn them about staying clear of the starboard wall, where Quill would be heading to rescue them. However, because of her stern and aggressive cadence, as well as her and Mantis fighting with each other, the children became scared. Drax was able to calm the children down by making monkey noises and then spoke to them in their [[Orbose|language]] about the plan. Nebula asked Drax why he didn't mention he knew their language, but he responded that she never asked him. [[File:Drax, Nebula and Mantis surrounded - Empire Exclusive.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula, [[Drax]] and [[Mantis]] see the [[Abilisks]]]] The walls of the pit them lifted, and the three found themselves surrounded by three [[Abilisks]]. They tried to escape, but were cut off at every turn, rendering them trapped. When all hope seemed lost, Mantis stepped out and approached one of the Abilisks. Nebula told her to stop, but Mantis reminded them that Abilisks only ate batteries, not people, and suspected the creatures were just scared. Nebula and Drax then watched as Mantis touched one of the Abilisks, which did not attack her, and she used her empathic powers to calm the creatures.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====[[Attack on Arête Laboratories|Fighting the High Evolutionary]]==== [[File:Guardians walking together.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] follow [[Rocket]]'s lead]] {{Quote|If [[Guardians of the Galaxy|we]] wanna live, we have to leave now. This whole [[Arête Laboratories|rig]] is gonna go down any second."
"[[Star Children|They]] will all die if we don't help them.|[[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Nebula, [[Drax the Destroyer]], and [[Mantis]] were able to ride on the [[Abilisks]] through [[Arête Laboratories]]. They headed to the starboard, where they were reunited with [[Star-Lord]], [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]], [[Rocket]], and [[Groot]]. Nebula informed the others about the [[Star Children|children]] and creatures trapped onboard, but Gamora stated that they needed to escape before the ship exploded; however, Nebula was adamant about saving the prisoners. They all noticed Rocket had headed off to save them, so the rest of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] followed his lead. [[File:Nebula (Volume 3).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula pilotting [[Arête Laboratories]]]] The Guardians entered a hallway filled with the [[High Evolutionary]]'s guards and [[Hell Spawn]], and as a team, they managed to successfully defeat every single enemy. Star-Lord made a plan for them to connect the hole in Arête Laboratories to [[Knowhere]], so Nebula and Rocket went to pilot the ship while the other rescued the children. Nebula and Rocket reached the control center, but found it destroyed. Nebula told Rocket she would deal with it, so he went back to help with the evacuation. Using her cybernetic arm, Nebula was able to pilot Arête Laboratories and lined it up with Knowhere. [[File:Nebula's new arm.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula fires a shot at the [[High Evolutionary]]]] Once the two were locked in, Nebula rushed back to help the evacuation. Nebula came across some of the children, so she helped them get to the port, carrying one on her back while yelling at them for being slow. With the children safe, Nebula regrouped with Star-Lord, who asked her where Rocket was. The Guardians went to find Rocket, who was fighting the High Evolutionary, so they all joined in and defeated him. They watched as Rocket spared his creator, and before they left, Rocket informed them of the caged animals, so they rescued them just before the ship exploded.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ===Protector of Knowhere=== ====Leaving the Guardians==== [[File:Nebula grunt.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula saying goodbye to her [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|sister]]]] {{Quote|So, you'll lead the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] then?"
"No. I'm gonna lead the [[Knowhere|city]], make it the type of home I never had.|[[Rocket Raccoon]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} In the aftermath of the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories|battle]], the [[United Ravagers|Ravagers]] arrived to pick up [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]], so Nebula waited by the ship for her to leave. After Gamora said goodbye to [[Peter Quill]], Nebula approached her sister and the two grunted at each other. Nebula then checked in with Quill, who told Nebula that he needed to speak with the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. [[File:Nebula ending.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula becomes the leader of [[Knowhere]]]] The Guardians gathered and listened to Quill reveal that he was leaving them team and returning to [[Earth]]. [[Mantis]] also revealed she was leaving, so [[Drax the Destroyer]] tried to join her. Nebula told Drax that she needed him on [[Knowhere]] to help take care of the [[Star Children]], affirming that he was not meant to be a destroyer but a dad. [[Rocket Raccoon]] asked if Nebula would lead the team, but she instead stated that she was going to lead Knowhere and turn it into the home she wished she had growing up. Quill appointed Rocket the Guardians' leader and they all saluted him. [[File:GotG Vol. 3 Trailer (31).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nebula lets loose and dances on [[Knowhere]]]] Quill and Mantis departed, so Nebula went outside and helped the survivors settle in on Knowhere. They all then heard music playing through the speakers, and Nebula watched as Rocket and [[Groot]] started to dance. The rest of the citizens of Knowhere joined in, and [[Phyla]] took Nebula's hand to encourage her to dance. Nebula softly swayed to the music at first, but soon got more comfortable and let loose, something she had always had trouble doing in the past. [[Cosmo]] let out a howl, and all the remaining Guardians howled as well, finally feeling no longer burdened by their past.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Luphomoid Physiology/Bionic Enhancement''': Nebula possesses natural higher physical capabilities beyond any human being, which are further enhanced by her cybernetic enhancements. **'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:GotGV2 - Big Game 24.png|thumb|250px|Nebula forcefully strangles [[Gamora]]]] Nebula has higher levels of superhuman strength, much greater than that of a human being. She managed to break through the windshield of an [[M-Ships|M-Ship]] and throw its pilot out of the vehicle in mid-air with ease and managed to temporarily overpower [[Gamora]] after the two of them survived an explosion. During the [[Battle on Ego's Planet]], Nebula was able to throw Gamora on top of a stone wall. She was also able to easily snap the neck of a [[Chitauri]] soldier with one arm, even while weakened due to prolonged torture at [[Thanos]]' hands. Nebula was even able to slightly stagger Thanos with a punch and several baton strikes, although Thanos soon easily overtook and sent her flying with a punch. She managed to steal [[Bucky Barnes|Bucky]]'s [[vibranium]] [[Winter Soldier's Prosthetic Arm|arm]] after fighting with him. In the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Nebula was able to easily break a metal lock on a cage containing the [[Star Children]] and she also managed to carry a tapir on her shoulders without effort while escaping the ship. With her new bionic arm, Nebula's strength apparently increased, as she managed to stop a punch from [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] that would have mortally wounded Quill, whereas before their strength was somewhat equal. **'''Superhuman Durability''': [[File:Nebula is Attacked.png|thumb|250px|Nebula being hit by a rocket launcher]] Nebula can easily withstand multiple injuries, especially impact trauma, such as falls from great heights. While her body was contorted by being blasted with [[Drax the Destroyer]]'s cannon at point blank range, she was otherwise unharmed and her cybernetic implants twisted her body back into place. She managed to jump onto an M-Ship from several stories without withstanding injuries and survived to be inside an exploding [[Construction Drilling Vessel|ship]] before landing on her feet several stories down unharmed. When plugging her mechanical arm into the ship to power the ship's energy beams, she was electrocuted and experienced great pain, but otherwise survived. She even managed to survive a powerful blow from Thanos and later a shockwave from the [[Infinity Gauntlet]]. During the [[Attack on Rocket]], Nebula withstood extremely strong hits from [[Adam Warlock]], breaking her jaw and stomach and being thrown into the wall at a high speed by the Sovereign, healing herself afterwards. Nebula also withstood Master [[Karja]]'s gunfire, which were able to injure [[Drax the Destroyer]]. Shortly after being noticed by the [[High Evolutionary]], Nebula withstood an attack from him that knocked out even Drax, though she was also knocked out. In the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Nebula was able to withstand the quantum blast of an [[Abilisks|Abilisk]], and after [[Mantis]] tamed the Abilisks, Nebula jumped off an Abilisk with no injuries. **'''Superhuman Agility''': [[File:Gamora and Nebula jump.png|thumb|250px|Nebula leaping towards a rock]] Nebula's agility and coordination allows her to easily keep up with Gamora in a fight and dodge her sister's attacks. Nebula was able to leap a considerable distance while escaping from [[Ego|Ego’s planet]] alongside Gamora. During the [[Battle of Titan]], she was able to leap at a great height to attack [[Thanos]] after she crashes her ship. Nebula jumped a great distance to reach the [[Arête Laboratories]] alongside Mantis and Drax. **'''Enhanced Stamina''': Nebula's cybernetic enhancements, granted by Thanos in order for her to keep up and be on equal footing with her adoptive sister, [[Gamora]], allowed her to gain increased stamina. **'''Enhanced Reflexes''': During her training with Gamora under the tuition of Thanos, she heightened her reflexes fast enough and they were enhanced by body cybernetic modifications.{{Ref|MSVD}} **'''Enhanced Senses''': Neural circuitry located under the headplate on her face augment Nebula's vision and hearing.{{Ref|MSVD}} **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': [[File:Nebula-Broken-Jaw.png|thumb|250px|Nebula repairing her broken body]] Nebula's extensive cybernetic implants allow her to quickly heal from otherwise near-fatal injuries, such as when her body was crushed and mangled when withstanding a direct blow from Drax's cannon. Due to her implants, she was able to reshape her body back to its original form by snapping her arms and jaw back into their normal place. Nebula was able to reshape her body after the impact of an exploding M-Ship. Nebula was able to reshape her body after being attacked by [[Adam Warlock]] and the [[Hell Spawn]]s. Nebula also recovers from piercing damage, as [[Kraglin Obfonteri|Kraglin]]'s [[Yaka Arrow]] pierced her but did not mortally wound her. **'''Holographic Projection''': Nebula's built-in synaptic drive and bionic visual enhancements give her the capability of replaying memories in the form of light projections. [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] accessed her memory files through her past self, as the two were mentally linked through their matching cybernetic neural networks, and was able to watch the fate of his own counterpart. **'''Weapon Creation''': As of [[2026]], Nebula acquired a new arm as part of her further cybernetic upgrades from Rocket. Nebula can change the arm's shape at will, which she demonstrated during the [[Attack on Rocket]], turning it into a cannon and later a blade, both to inflict damage on [[Adam Warlock]]. ***'''Energy Blasts''': [[File:Nebula flying.jpeg|thumb|250px|Nebula using her energy blasts]] With her new arm, Nebula manages to modify her arm into a plasma cannon weapon, capable of sending Adam Warlock through buildings. She also damaged the [[High Evolutionary]] with her energy blasts. ***'''Concussion Beams''': Nebula's cybernetic arm allows her to fire concussive electroshock charges from her hand towards her enemies or over a specific target area. **'''Electronic Communication''': Through her cybernetic enhancements, Nebula can interpret and intercept electronic information. She managed to read all of [[Rocket]]'s files, discovering that he had a kill switch embedded inside his body. Later, after getting the device from [[Theel]], Nebula was also able to see and interpret all of the files, seeing all the experiments that Rocket went through, showing through a hologram to the other Guardians. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|I win. I bested you in combat.|Nebula to [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} *'''Master Combatant''': [[File:GamoraVsNebula.jpg|thumb|250px|Nebula fighting against [[Gamora]]]] Nebula is a highly skilled and formidable hand-to-hand combatant, having trained extensively as an assassin under [[Thanos]] ever since she was a child as well as years of fighting experience when carrying out Thanos' missions. Nebula's skill in combat allowed her to compete with "the deadliest woman in the galaxy," Gamora, for a prolonged amount of time and even managed to defeat her when both were wounded after escaping an explosion, although it should be noted that Gamora was weakened more than Nebula was due to Nebula's more extensive cybernetics and the fact that Gamora had not been fighting to kill, but was trying to reason with Nebula; thus, she was holding back. Her most impressive display of skill was seen when she briefly fought Thanos one-on-one; although she was eventually no match for her far stronger and more experienced father, Nebula was still able to fare better than [[Drax the Destroyer]] as well as [[Doctor Strange]], able to briefly pressure and land two blows on Thanos, whereas Drax and Strange had difficulty fighting Thanos even with a webbed cotton hampering Thanos' eyesight and could not a land single hit in said occasion, although Thanos was briefly distracted by her mentions of Gamora and soon easily knocked her aside. During the mission to save [[Rocket]], Nebula fought several soldiers on the [[Arête Laboratories|High Evolutionary's ship]]. *'''Staff Mastery''': [[File:Nebula Endgame.png|thumb|250px|Nebula using her electric batons]] Nebula is highly skilled at using sticks and staffs in combat, her retractable electric batons being her preferred weapon. Using her staff, she was able to contend with Gamora using her sword and even managed to disarm her. Later, she was able to briefly force Thanos to the defensive and land some blows until she was defeated easily. *'''Sword Mastery''': Nebula is a skilled Swordsman, with her using her Bionic Arm's sword, to fight and stab her enemies. *'''Expert Marksman''': Nebula is a highly skilled marksman proficient in sharpshooting. During the [[Attack on Berhert]], Nebula was able to accurately shoot off [[Yondu Udonta]]'s [[Yaka Arrow Controller]] before incapacitating [[Rocket]]. She was also able to rapidly draw her blaster and fatally shoot her past self in the chest as she was aiming her own weapon at past Gamora. {{Quote|I am every inch the warrior you are. The screams of my victims fill every field.|Nebula to [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} *'''Master Assassin''': Nebula is a highly skilled assassin, having trained extensively as an assassin under [[Thanos]] ever since she was a child. She trained with [[Gamora]] throughout her childhood, but Nebula stated that she was not as skilled as her sister. Despite that, Nebula was skilled enough that even Thanos commented Nebula almost succeeded in killing him after sneaking into his spaceship. *'''Expert Pilot''': Nebula is a highly trained pilot, with Gamora acknowledging her as being better and more knowledgeable at piloting than her, capable of easily flying a [[Necrocraft]] and an [[M-Ships|M-Ship]] with great efficiency. During the [[Skirmish on Knowhere]], Nebula was able to maneuver around Gamora's mining pod with ease and eventually shoot her ship down. *'''Bilingualism''': Nebula is fluent in her native language, and she can also understand [[Groot]] after spending years with him. ==Equipment== ===Cybernetic Enhancements=== In her early years under Thanos' wing, Nebula received various upgrades that allowed her to gain extensive cybernetic properties and body features. *'''Cybernetic Arm''': Nebula possesses a cybernetic metal left arm after her escape from a [[Laser-Thorn Energy Net]] within the [[Cloud Tombs of Praxius]].{{Ref|GotGP1}} The arm is capable of acting as a generator for electricity as it was used to power the broken down Ravagers ship her and [[Yondu Udonta]] were on to eliminate the multiple [[Sovereign]] ships. Her hand is designed to imitate the appearance of flesh, but it is capable of hacking into computer systems, demonstrated by a time traveled version of Nebula from [[2014/Cosmic Time Heist|2014]]. However, after losing her left hand during the [[Battle of Xandar]], Nebula replaces it with another cybernetic hand which does not imitate the appearance of flesh, nor capable of hacking into computer systems. In order to obtain the [[Orb]], Nebula had to damage her arm in order to pull it out of the energy barrier encasing it. *'''Contact Whiplash''': Nebula possesses a grappling hook within her left arm. *'''Tempersteel Claws''': Nebula possessed two sets of retractable claws, one in each hand, that she can activate to grip onto surfaces to assist her when she is climbing. After losing her left arm, Nebula lost her left set of tempersteel claws.{{Ref|GotGP1}} *'''Regeneration Implant''': Nebula possesses a regeneration implant that is situated within her body. This implant allows her to rapidly heal from near-fatal injuries and wounds as well as enabling her to reshape her body back to its original form. *'''Cybernetic Communicator''': Nebula has a cybernetic message communicator planted in her brain, which she used to alert the [[Sakaarans]] that Gamora had the Orb, and to directly confront her shortly thereafter. Nebula also used to it to alert [[Thanos]] that she was in possession of the [[Nano Gauntlet]] during the [[Attack on the Avengers Compound]]. {{Quote|I just never noticed how black your eyes were."
"They were replaced by my [[Thanos|father]] as a method of torture.|[[Star-Lord]] and Nebula|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} *'''Visual Prosthesis''': During Nebula's upbringing with [[Thanos]], her father had pulled her eye from her head as a consequence for losing a battle against [[Gamora]]. Thanos replaced her left eye with a bionic one, this bionic eye allows her to create projections of a specific event. *'''Synaptic Drive''': One of Nebula's cybernetics includes a neuro-synaptic implant located on the side of her head and also forms part of her brain. It is capable of recording memories and replaying memory files from past events. [[Thanos]] used Nebula's synaptic drive to replay the recorded memory of her conversation with [[Gamora]], in which she confessed that she found the map to the [[Soul Stone]]'s location and burned it. *'''[[Translator Implant]]''': Nebula has a translator implant that helps her understand many of the languages spoken in the universe.[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1639784535884984322?s=20 James Gunn on Twitter - March 25, 2023] ===Weapons=== *'''[[Electroshock Batons]]''': [[File:Nebula-Fight-Gamora.png|thumb|250px|Nebula electrocuting [[Gamora]]]] Nebula's weapons of choice are baton-like electroshock weapons which can be combined to form a longer electroshock staff that can generate powerful amounts of electrical energy. It could also be thrown and return magnetically to her cybernetic arm, demonstrated by her brief skirmish with [[Thanos]]. *'''[[Electric Blaster]]''': Nebula's alternate weapon is a blaster which can fire blasts of electricity to electrocute and stun its targets, knocking them unconscious. She used it on [[Rocket]] and [[Yondu Udonta]] to escape [[Berhert]]. This weapon, however was more than capable of being lethal, as Nebula blasted a hole into the chest of her past self, killing her. *'''[[Godslayer]]''': During their skirmish on [[Ego the Living Planet]], Nebula took [[Gamora]]'s sword [[Godslayer]] and attempted to kill her sister with it. However, she chose not to. *'''[[Knowhere Jetpack|Jetpack]]''': During the [[Attack on Rocket]], Nebula used a jetpack to fight [[Adam Warlock]], flying to the sovereign. The jetpack was destroyed in combat after Adam Warlock knocked Nebula to the ground. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Time Suit]]''': This suit was designed in order to time travel through the [[Quantum Realm]] safely. It is a white, red and black suit that materialize around the wearer's regular clothes, managing to be summoned when time travel is required again, and disappear when no longer in use. It has size-shifting adaptability down to subatomic levels and a wrist gadget that allows for displacement through time and space. *'''[[Lock Pick]]''': A small device designed to automatically open doors, stolen from [[Star-Lord]] in [[Morag]], and used on the door to the [[Temple Vault]] storing the [[Orb]]. *'''[[Space Suit]]''': A special suit used to survive in the vacuum of space. Nebula and the other [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] used the suits until [[Mantis]] accidentally threw them away. ===Vehicles=== *'''[[Q-Ship]]''': As being a part of Thanos' [[Black Order]], she commandeers the Q-Ship with her sister. Gamora, in missions that benefit her adoptive father. *'''''[[Dark Aster]]''''': [[File:Nebula.PNG|thumb|250px|Nebula aboard the ''Dark Aster'']] During her time working with [[Ronan the Accuser]], Nebula was a passenger on his ship. Nebula then threw the [[List of Minor Characters/Phase Two#Guardians of the Galaxy|pilot]] out and took control of the ship before flying it far away from the battle. It would break down after 24 days of travel, but eventually, they were rescued in deep space by [[Captain Marvel]], who delivered them to Earth. Nebula would also ride the ''Benatar'' to take part in the [[Ambush on Thanos]]. After the [[Snap]], Nebula used the ''Benatar'' as her home alongside [[Rocket]]. However, while War Machine successfully returned, Nebula was unable to as her network and synaptic drive linked with that of her alternate past self, realizing that the [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] of the alternate 2014 timeline had been made aware of their plan, Nebula rushed to the space pod and used its communication device to inform Romanoff and Barton, although to no avail. The space pod, with Nebula inside it, was then brought aboard the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' via tractor beam. Her appearance in the movies seems to be based more on her second incarnation from the comics. ==Behind the Scenes== *{{WPS|Gal Gadot}} revealed she was up for the role of Nebula.[http://www.comicbookmovie.com/fansites/KingPatel/news/?a=127968 Before Landing ''WONDER WOMAN,'' Was Gal Gadot Up For A Role In ''GUARDIANS OF THE GALAXY''?] *[[Lupita Nyong'o]] was also considered for the role of Nebula.[https://cassiuslife.com/103064/chadwick-boseman-lupita-nyongo-mcu-auditions/amp/ MCU Casting Director Reveals Chadwick Boseman, Lupita Nyong'o Initially Auditioned For Other Roles] *In ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'', [[Karen Gillan]] shaved her head to play Nebula (the hair, in turn, was made into a wig, which Gillan wore in the TV show ''Selfie'').[https://mashable.com/2014/07/15/marvel-made-karen-gillian-a-wig/ Marvel Made Karen Gillan a Wig of Her Own Hair That She'll Wear on 'Selfie'] In later appearances, her hair was only shortened, with the reminder lifted into a bun which was hidden by the prosthetics that make Nebula's facial make-up. *Nebula's make-up, which includes a glued together five-piece prosthetic in the head and contact lenses, took approximately four hours and 15 minutes to apply and another 30 minutes to remove in ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]''.[https://www.businessinsider.com/guardians-of-the-galaxy-karen-gillan-makeup-2014-8 The Most Complex Makeup In ‘Guardians Of The Galaxy’ Took More Than 4 Hours And A Shaved Head] By ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'', the applying was reduced to a two and a half hours.[https://screenrant.com/nebula-drax-makeup-guardians-of-the-galaxy-2/ Nebula & Drax's Makeup Drastically Improved For Guardians of the Galaxy 2] *[[Karen Gillan]] stated that "I think she's a really interesting character. What I like to play around with is how jealous she is. She's Gamora's sister, and there's a lot of sibling rivalry. That's the most interesting aspect to me because jealousy can consume you and turn you bitter, and ugly. And she's a total sadist, so that's fun too."[http://www.cbr.com/gillan-discusses-guardians-of-the-galaxys-nebula-ronans-intimidation-factor/ Gillan Discusses “''Guardians of the Galaxy''’s” Nebula, Ronan’s Intimidation Factor] *[[Karen Gillan]] also said, "She is very sadistic and evil, but I like to think for a very valid reason."[http://www.iamrogue.com/roguetv/video-interviews/item/10040-iar-video-director-james-gunn-and-karen-gillan-talk-guardians-of-the-galaxy.html IAR VIDEO: DIRECTOR JAMES GUNN AND KAREN GILLAN
